description: Perfect for those casual walkers, the nike Elite is a pleasure to wear and great to look good in. Constructed using suede and nylon for the upper, the nike Elite looks fashionable and stylish, while remaining absolutely light, making it a great pair to team with jeans and tees.Upper Nylon upper with suede overlays for dry-Fit comfort, lightweight feel, durability and to provide shoe structure Padded back heel sockliner for comfort Reinforced heel cup for support to the backfoot Reinforced toe box liner for durability and protection to the forefoot Suede lace lining for durability Cotton twill laces for comfort Perforated tongue for breathability Midsole EVA midsole for durability and lightweight comfort Mildly padded sockliner for impact protection Outsole Custom Van Rubber outsole for durability Classic waffle tread pattern for maximum traction and grip Reinforced toe guard and heel guard for durability Shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
